default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategies for sourcing and hiring content strategists/writers for the AI content creation team.](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on finding strong writers first, SEO skills secondary](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Leverage LinkedIn job posts, paid promotion to increase applicant volume](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Explore freelance platforms like Upwork for part-time/temp hires](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Streamline hiring process - use video interviews before full assessments](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)

## Topics

### Ideal Candidate Profile

  - [Strong writing/communication skills most important](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [SEO knowledge helpful but can be trained](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Journalism background could translate well](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### Sourcing Channels

  - [LinkedIn - paid job promotion, manual searches](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Freelance platforms like Upwork for temp/part-time hires](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Referrals from existing team](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Hiring Process Optimizations

  - [Use video interviews to quickly assess communication skills](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Streamline assessments for strong referral candidates](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Prioritize volume of applicants over perfecting process initially](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### Cost Considerations

  - [Aim for $10-15/hr rate for full-time hires](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Freelancers $5-10/hr could supplement for specific tasks](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Upfront investment in paid job promotion to increase pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to integrate new job posting, port candidates to new Workable account](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Marcel to explore Upwork for freelance options, do LinkedIn searches](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Set up video interview step before full assessments](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Promote job actively on LinkedIn to increase applicant volume](https://fathom.video/share/TQvg-4hrkQ5ZNTy44AyochvzswvW_JQz?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)

action_items.description: Look into WeWork Remotely job board to see if it could be a potential source of candidates
Search Upwork for potential candidates within the $5-$10/hour pay range, and find an article to assign as a sample task
Move existing candidates over from old Workable job post to new one, update application link, and reintegrate the Test Gorilla assessment
Consider jumping strong referrals or candidates you feel really good about straight to the written prompt assessment, skipping initial assessments
Cancel scheduled meeting for that day
